description: Gravity-based puzzle platformer. Player at grid (3,23), gem at (3,7). Grid is 11 wide, y=0 at bottom. Gravity pulls downward (dy=-1). Only LEFT/RIGHT/CLICK/UNDO available. Player walks right to gap at x=7 in floor y=22, falls through, then clicks breakable blocks to clear vertical path downward to gem.

steps_explained: R R R R: walk right from (3,23) to (7,23), fall through gap at (7,22) to (7,20)
CLICK (42,32): break block at grid (7,19), fall to (7,16)
CLICK (24,38): break block at grid (4,16), no fall (not directly below player)
L L L: walk left from (7,16) to (4,16)
CLICK (24,32): break block at grid (4,15), fall to (4,13)
CLICK (24,32): break block at grid (4,12), fall to (4,10)
CLICK (30,32): break block at grid (5,9), fall to (5,7)
L L: walk left from (5,7) through (4,7) to (3,7) = GEM -> WIN

grid_layout.note: Grid is 11 wide, 36 tall. y=0 is bottom. Reversed from raw data.
